title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF JACKSON COUNTY CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides therapy/counseling referrals, advocacy services, and community trainings. 816 W 10th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 18 or younger who are alleged victims of child abuse; and non-offending family members Hours: Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Specialized therapy groups are scheduled at varying times. Call for information on days and times of parent groups. Email (541) 734-5437 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 734-5437 Main phone Main phone (541) 734-5437 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: By referral from ODHS or law enforcement only. Call for information about other types of referrals accepted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Highway 99, go west on W 10th Street. The Center is located on the corner of Newtown and W 10th Street, in two buildings between Mistletoe and Newtown. Walk east on W Main to Newtown and turn right. Walk two blocks to W 10th Street. Bus #2 stops at the corner of Hamilton and W Main. Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF JACKSON COUNTY
